name: such-skills
description: A collection of useful Claude Code skills and plugins built by Raj Nandan Sharma.

plugins.name: ss-image-manipulation
plugins.description: Image manipulation tools: PNG-to-SVG vector conversion, platform-aware image resizing for 60+ presets, and lossless image format conversion (PNG, JPG, WebP, TIFF, BMP, GIF, HEIC, AVIF).

plugins.name: ss-svelte-coding
plugins.description: Svelte development tools: shadcn-svelte component detection and documentation for building accessible UIs in SvelteKit projects.

plugins.name: ss-svg-animations
plugins.description: Hand-crafted, dependency-free SVG animation: self-drawing paths, loading spinners, morphing shapes, motion paths, animated gradients, and complex layered scenes with particles and parallax — with the right technique (CSS vs SMIL) chosen for where the SVG will live.

plugins.name: ss-no-slop
plugins.description: Remove AI slop from prose: edit drafts into sharper, more human writing while preserving the writer's voice, detect and name AI patterns in a text without rewriting it, or draft new prose with no AI tells — 30+ patterns caught, from binary contrasts and colon reveals to false agency and fake-profound kickers. Ships an always-on SessionStart hook that applies the rules to every session with zero setup.
